name: Blackwing - Tornado the Reverse Wind
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＢＦ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ブラックフェザー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>逆</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>さか</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>巻</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>まき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>のトルネード
name_jp_tl: Black Feather - Tornado the Reverse Wind
desc: When this card is Normal Summoned while your opponent controls a Special Summoned monster: You can target 1 "Blackwing" Tuner in your GY; you cannot Special Summon monsters from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, except "Blackwing" monsters, also Special Summon that monster, but its effects are negated.
mnst_eff: When this card is Normal Summoned while your opponent controls a Special Summoned monster: You can target 1 "Blackwing" Tuner in your GY; you cannot Special Summon monsters from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, except "Blackwing" monsters, also Special Summon that monster, but its effects are negated.
eff: When this card is Normal Summoned while your opponent controls a Special Summoned monster: You can target 1 "Blackwing" Tuner in your GY; you cannot Special Summon monsters from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, except "Blackwing" monsters, also Special Summon that monster, but its effects are negated.

mst: Negates the effects of the Summoned monsters
summoning: Restricts the player's Special Summons to archetype specific monsters
Restricts the player's Special Summons from the Extra Deck
